mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM module_types WHERE is_active = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM modules m JOIN module_details md ON md.module_id = m.id AND md.is_active = 1 WHERE m.module_type_id = module_types.id AND m.is_active = 1 )
AND name ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'

SELECT id, public_id::text AS publicKey, code, name, name_other AS nameOther, menu_group_code AS groupCode, menu_group_name AS groupName, menu_group_order AS groupOrderNo FROM module_types WHERE is_active = 1 AND id = #{id}

SELECT mt.id AS moduleTypeId, mt.public_id::text AS moduleTypePublicKey, mt.code AS moduleTypeCode, mt.name AS moduleTypeName, mt.name_other AS moduleTypeNameOther, mt.display_order AS moduleTypeOrder, m.id AS moduleId, m.public_id::text AS modulePublicKey, m.code AS moduleCode, m.name AS moduleName, m.display_order AS moduleOrder, md.id AS moduleDetailId, md.public_id::text AS moduleDetailPublicKey, md.code AS code, md.action_key AS "actionKey", md.display_order AS "orderNo", md.name AS moduleDetailName, md.name_other AS moduleDetailNameOther, md.type AS moduleDetailType, CASE WHEN up.module_detail_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS checked FROM module_types mt JOIN modules m ON m.module_type_id = mt.id AND m.is_active = 1 JOIN module_details md ON md.module_id = m.id AND md.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT rmd.module_detail_id FROM user_groups ug JOIN roles r ON r.id = ug.role_id AND r.is_active = 1 JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.role_id = r.id WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND ug.is_active = 1 ) up ON up.module_detail_id = md.id WHERE mt.is_active = 1 ORDER BY mt.display_order, mt.id, m.display_order, m.id, md.display_order, md.id
